SUBJECT: Be Afraid. Be VERY Afraid.

convertlinks

Whew, what a week.

Andy Jenkins here, and man, it's really been
one for the books...

First of all, our "Going Natural 2.0" video
went completely ballistic--more than we ever
expected.

In fact, the Stomper blog has been flooded
with postings from people raving about the
video - and at least one person who saw
results in as little as 3 days after putting
these strategies in action.

(In the video, I said it would take a week.
So scribble another red checkmark on the
"Andy is Wrong" list.)

That's really cool. And I'm glad those little
tweaks are creating big results for you.

HOWEVER, while double listings in Google can
bring a huge traffic increase, there's
something else lurking at Google that's not
so pretty...

In fact, it can get downright ugly. REAL
ugly. We're talking making the Exorcist look
like Mary friggin' Poppins.

You might want to shield your eyes before
looking at my latest video...

(If you are still seeing Going Natural Video #1,
just click the playlist button on the player and 
select "Destroy Duplicate Content")

Again, there's nothing to buy there. Just
some major league "shock and awe" that
reveals the true inner workings of the
hideous beast known as "duplicate content".

OK, maybe "hideous beast" is a little
over-the-top, but if you've ever been dropped
from Google and had no clue as to why, you
might not think so...

And this video could show you exactly what
happened... and why.

Now if you've been lucky enough to have never
had the privilege of seeing all your hard
work wiped from the face of the web, then
count yourself lucky...

... because this is one of those hidden
"gotchas" that can sneak up on you out of
nowhere - even if you're playing by the rules
AND your content is 100% original.

Pretty amazing.

And VERY scary.

The bottom line is that if you have a web
site, any type of web site, you NEED to watch
this video - or you risk getting dropped from
Google. 

(If you are still seeing Going Natural Video #1,
just click the playlist button on the player and 
select "Destroy Duplicate Content")

Andy

P.S. Lot of people think they know all about
duplicate content and how their site can be
penalized.

But they have no clue just how devastating it
can really be. We're not just talking a
temporary dip from page 1 to page 3, we're
talking total annihilation.

Think you're safe? Think again.

(If you are still seeing Going Natural Video #1,
just click the playlist button on the player and 
select "Destroy Duplicate Content")
